# `cc-journal summarize`

- **Usage**: `cc-journal summarize [--session <SESSION_ID>] [--force] [SESSION_ID]`

Summarize a session and write to journal

## Arguments

### `[SESSION_ID]`

Session ID to summarize

## Flags

### `--session <SESSION_ID>`

Session ID (alternative to positional arg)

### `--force`

Re-summarize even if already journaled
